channel.title: Upsssc on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Upsssc on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: UPSSSC Excise Constable Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC has released the Excise Constable Recruitment 2026 notification for a total of 722 posts. Candidates who have passed 10+2 (Intermediate) and appeared in PET 2025 are eligible to apply. The application process is online, starting from 04/06/2026 and ending on 24/06/2026. The selection will be based on PET score shortlisting, followed by a written examination, physical test, and document verification. The age limit is 18 to 40 years, with relaxation as per government rules.
